provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female ship officer in her late 40s with lines around her mouth from years of giving orders under artificial lighting, wearing a pressed steel-blue shipboard uniform jacket with a rigid high collar and two tarnished silver rank tabs at the collar points, a diagonal shoulder strap connecting to a slim worn polymer sidearm holster that shows the weapon mold from years of carrying, regulation charcoal trousers with a crease that was sharp once, black composite-sole shipboard shoes scuffed at the toe, the jacket shows pilling at the elbows and a subtle shine at pressure points
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
